---
title: "MS SQL Rationalization Reference-Data Pattern Library Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-18
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.schema.json)
- **Canon data:** [`src/uiao/canon/data/mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.yaml`](../../../src/uiao/canon/data/mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.yaml)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/mssql-rationalization/reference-data-patterns.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Schema for the **canon-blessed reference-data pattern library** consumed by Phase 2's `IDENTICAL-REFERENCE-DATA` overlap detector. Each pattern declares an expected row-count window, a representative schema fingerprint, and the authoritative external source.

Phase 2's overlap detection hashes the candidate reference tables in each discovered SQL instance and matches them against this library. A match means the substrate has discovered another agency-instance carrying the same canonical reference set — a consolidation candidate.

## Seed entries (11 federal-typical patterns)

| Pattern | Source authority | Expected rows |
|---|---|---|
| `us-state-codes` | USPS / ISO 3166-2:US | 50–60 |
| `country-codes-iso3166` | ISO 3166 | 240–260 |
| `currency-codes-iso4217` | ISO 4217 | 170–180 |
| `opm-occupation-series` | OPM | 450–520 |
| `opm-pay-plan-codes` | OPM | 70–90 |
| `gs-grade-codes` | OPM | 15–20 |
| `dod-service-component-codes` | DoD | 10–15 |
| `employment-status-enums` | Agency HR canon | 8–15 |
| `pii-classification-levels` | NIST 800-122 / Privacy Act | 5–10 |
| `fedramp-impact-levels` | FedRAMP PMO | 3 |
| `nist-control-families` | NIST 800-53r5 | 20–22 |

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema-version` | string (semver) | ✓ | Document schema version. |
| `document_id` | const `mssql-rationalization-reference-data-patterns` |   | Stable document handle. |
| `updated` | string (date) |   | ISO 8601 date of last edit. |
| `patterns` | array&lt;ReferenceDataPattern&gt; | ✓ | One entry per canon-blessed pattern. |

## `ReferenceDataPattern` Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `pattern_id` | string (kebab-case) | ✓ | Unique stable id within the library. |
| `description` | string | ✓ | One-sentence operational description. |
| `expected_row_count` | object `{min, max}` | ✓ | Bounds on row count for the canonical content. |
| `schema_fingerprint` | array&lt;column-name&gt; | ✓ | Minimum column set required to match the pattern. |
| `reference_content_hash` | string (SHA-256 hex) |   | Optional hash of a canonical serialization of the authoritative reference content. |
| `reference_url` | URI |   | Pointer to the authoritative external source. |
| `source_authority` | string | ✓ | Owner of the canonical content. |
| `reference_version` | string |   | Version pin of the authoritative external source. |
| `notes` | string |   | Free-text governance notes. |

## Related canon

| Canon | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [ADR-074](../../adr/adr-074-drift-ssot-contention.qmd) | Drift class that consumes overlap-detection findings. |
| MS SQL Estate Rationalization Process spec (Appendix A) | Defines the seed entries. |
| [`domain-catalog.schema.qmd`](mssql-rationalization-domain-catalog.schema.qmd) | Sibling canon-data file used by Phase 3 SSOT designation. |
| [`abbreviation-dictionary.schema.qmd`](mssql-rationalization-abbreviation-dictionary.schema.qmd) | Sibling canon-data file used by Phase 2's name-similarity heuristic. |
